summary: Iteration 2 testing completed for Turkish Telegram betting bot admin panel. All 45 backend tests passed. Frontend admin panel fully functional with all tabs and premium management working correctly.
test_credentials: No auth required for API endpoints
context_for_next_testing_agent: All admin panel features tested and working. Premium system uses FREE_TOTAL_LIMIT=3 (TOTAL coupons, not daily). Admin endpoints: /api/admin/dashboard, /api/admin/users, /api/admin/payments, /api/admin/premium all working. Frontend tabs: Genel Bakis (overview), Kullanicilar (users), Odemeler (payments) all functional. Premium activate/deactivate via UI tested and working.

premium_helper: can_use_risk_level allows banko for free user
can_use_risk_level allows orta for free user
can_use_risk_level blocks zor for free user
can_use_risk_level allows zor for premium user
is_premium_active returns False for missing fields
is_premium_active returns True for active premium
is_premium_active returns False for expired premium
activate_premium monthly returns correct fields with expiry_reminder_sent
frontend_ui: Overview tab shows all stats (users, premium, coupons, etc.)
Users tab shows user list with Premium Ver buttons
Users tab shows ADMIN badge for admin user
Payments tab shows empty message when no payments
Premium Ver button activates premium (shows PREMIUM badge, Kaldir button, expiry date)
Kaldir button deactivates premium (shows UCRETSIZ, Premium Ver button)

mocked_apis_note: AI analyzer has fallback predictions when LLM fails (as documented)
